title: SBI VC Trade Breaks New Ground with Japan’s First Licensed USDC Lending Service
tags: one year after SBI VC Trade became the first licensed operator in Japan to trade USDC;SBI VC Trade first to be licensed as “Electronic Payment Instruments Business Operator”SBI VC Trade has completed registration as an “Electronic Payment Instruments Business Operator”, which will enable it to handle USDC in Japan.Japan FinTech ObserverNorbert Gehrke
